narrative:
Indian Hill A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 704 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points.
